fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the general ledger account.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purpose of the account. Total: Used to total a series of balances on accounts from many different account groupings. To use Total, leave this field blank. Begin-Total: A marker for the beginning of a series of accounts to be totaled that ends with an End-Total account. End-Total: A total of a series of accounts that starts with the preceding Begin-Total account. The total is defined in the Totaling field.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a dimension value code. To see the dimension value codes you have set up for this dimension in the Dimension Values window, choose the field.
If you enter a dimension value code in this field, the program will use the corresponding dimension value as default each time you enter the account on an entry line. Default dimension values are only suggestions and you can change them on the entry line, for example in a journal.
Click here to learn more about dimensions.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a dimension value code. To see the dimension value codes you have set up for this dimension in the Dimension Values window, choose the field.
If you enter a dimension value code in this field, the program will use the corresponding dimension value as default each time you enter the account on an entry line. Default dimension values are only suggestions and you can change them on the entry line, for example in a journal.
Click here to learn more about dimensions.

fields.name: Account Category
fields.tooltip: Specifies the category of the G/L account.

fields.name: Income/Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a general ledger account is an income statement account or a balance sheet account.

fields.name: Debit/Credit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of entries that will normally be posted to this general ledger account.

fields.name: No. 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternative account number which can be used internally in the company.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether there is a Comment for this G/L account.
To view a Comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Account, and then click Comments. A comment sheet window will appear in which you can see the existing comments and create new ones. See also the Comment Line table.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Direct Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you will be able to post directly or only indirectly to this general ledger account.

fields.name: Reconciliation Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether this general ledger account will be included in the Reconciliation window in the general journal. To have the G/L account included in the window, place a check mark in the check box. You can find the Reconciliation window by clicking Actions, Posting in the General Journal window.

fields.name: New Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you want a new page to start immediately after this general ledger account when you print the chart of accounts. Select this field to start a new page after this general ledger account.

fields.name: No. of Blank Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of blank lines that you want inserted before this account in the chart of accounts.

fields.name: Indentation
fields.tooltip:
Shows how many spaces the text field for the account is indented relative to the standard margin.
The field is filled in automatically when you click Actions, point to Functions, and click Indent Chart of Accounts.
You can enter something in the field, but the contents will be replaced the next time you click Indent Chart of Accounts. If you want a bigger indentation, add blank spaces with the spacebar before you enter the text.
Indentation, New Page, and No. of Blank Lines define the layout of the chart of accounts.

fields.name: Source Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the allowed source currency code if Source Currency Posting value is Same Currency.

fields.name: Source Currency Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies how amounts in foreign currencies should be posted to this account.

fields.name: Source Currency Revaluation
fields.tooltip: Specifies if source currency revaluation should be done for this account.

fields.name: Unrealized Revaluation
fields.tooltip: Specifies if revaluation should be posted to currency realized or unrealized gains and losses accounts.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the G/L account was last modified.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval. The Balance at Date and Balance at Date fields show the balance from the starting to the ending dates of the filter.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a filter for a dimension, so that the values in the Net Change, Balance at Date, Balance, Budget at Date, and Budgeted Amount fields are based only on the dimension values included in the filter.
Click here to learn more about dimensions.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a filter for a dimension, so that the values in the Net Change, Balance at Date, Balance, Budget at Date, and Budgeted Amount fields are based only on the dimension values included in the filter.
Click here to learn more about dimensions.

fields.name: Balance at Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account balance on the last date included in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Net Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net change in the account balance during the time period in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Budgeted Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the G/L account's total budget or, if you have specified a name in the Budget Name field, a specific budget.

fields.name: Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies an account interval or a list of account numbers. The entries of the account will be totaled to give a total balance. How entries are totaled depends on the value in the Account Type field.

fields.name: Budget Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a Budget Filter so that the values in the Budgeted Amount and Budget at Date fields will be based on the selected budgets only.
You can enter budget names, using a maximum of 10 characters (both numbers and letters). There are certain rules for how these can be combined:

Meaning
Sample Expression
Entries Included

Equal to

1

Those from Budget 1 (the budget name could contain letters instead of just numbers)


Interval

1.. 5

Those from Budgets 1 through 5


To see the G/L budgets in the G/L Budget Name table, choose the field.

fields.name: Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance on this account.

fields.name: Budget at Date
fields.tooltip:
Displays the budgeted amount up to and including the last date of the filter defined in the Date Filter field. If the filter field contains more than one date (for example, an interval), only the last one has any effect on the contents of this field.
The program automatically calculates and updates the contents of the field using the Amount field in the G/L Budget Entry table.
You can filter the Budget at Date field so that its contents are based only on certain Global Dimension 1 values, Global Dimension 2 values and/or business units.

fields.name: Consol. Translation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the consolidation translation method that will be used for the account.

fields.name: Consol. Debit Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number in a consolidated company to transfer credit balances.

fields.name: Consol. Credit Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number in a consolidated company to transfer credit balances.

fields.name: Business Unit Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a Business Unit Filter so that the values in the Net Change, Balance at Date, Balance, Budget at Date, and Budgeted Amount fields only display the balance for the selected business unit(s).
You can enter business unit codes, using a maximum of 10 characters, both numbers and letters. There are specific rules for how these can be combined:

Meaning
Sample Expression
Entries Included

Equal to

1

Those from Business Unit 1 (the code can be letters instead of numbers)


Interval

1..5

Those from Business Units 1 through 5


Either/or

1|2

Those from Business Unit 1 or 2


Different from

<>1

All entries except those belonging to Business Unit 1


To see the business unit codes in the Business Units window, choose the field.

fields.name: Gen. Posting Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Picture
fields.tooltip:
Displays the picture that has been set up for the account.
The field is blank if a picture has not been imported.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.

fields.name: Automatic Ext. Texts
fields.tooltip: Specifies that an extended text will be added automatically to the account.

fields.name: Budgeted Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Budgeted Debit Amount for the account.

fields.name: Budgeted Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Budgeted Credit Amount for the account.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a Tax Area Code for the account. To see the available tax area codes, choose the field.
When you post transactions to this account, the program uses this code in combination with a Tax Group code and the Tax Liable field to find the necessary information for calculating sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether transactions to this account are liable for sales tax.
When you post transactions to this account, the program uses this code and a combination of the Tax Area Code and a Tax Group code to find the necessary information for calculating sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax group that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Net Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net change in the account balance.

fields.name: Add.-Currency Balance at Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account balance, in the additional reporting currency, on the last date included in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance on this account, in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Exchange Rate Adjustment
fields.tooltip: Specifies how general ledger accounts will be adjusted for exchange rate fluctuations between LCY and the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Add.-Currency Debit Amount
fields.tooltip:
Shows the total of the debit entries in the additional reporting currency that have been posted to the account.
To see the ledger entries that make up the debit amount, choose the field.

fields.name: Add.-Currency Credit Amount
fields.tooltip:
Shows the total of the credit entries in the additional reporting currency that have been posted to the account.
To see the ledger entries that make up the credit amount, choose the field.

fields.name: Default IC Partner G/L Acc. No
fields.tooltip: Specifies the intercompany account number associated with the G/L account.

fields.name: Omit Default Descr. in Jnl.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the default description is automatically inserted in the Description field on journal lines created for this general ledger account.

fields.name: Source Curr. Balance at Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account foreign currency balance on the last date included in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Source Currency Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the foreign currency balance on the G/L account.

fields.name: Account Subcategory Descript.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subcategory of the account category of the G/L account.

fields.name: Exclude From Consolidation
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the account is excluded from consolidation.

fields.name: Cost Type No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a cost type number to establish which cost type a general ledger account belongs to.

fields.name: Default Deferral Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default deferral template that governs how to defer revenues and expenses to the periods when they occurred.
